message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 蓝牙配对-搜索流程

skinparam packageStyle rectangle
package "sdk_client" {
    participant "IotRecorderManager" as IotRecorderManager
    participant "DevicesManagerMachine" as DevicesManagerMachine
    participant "BlueDiscoveryControl" as BlueDiscoveryControl
    participant "BlueBondControl" as BlueBondControl
    participant "BleScanControl" as BleScanControl
    participant "BluetoothGattConfig" as BluetoothGattConfig
}

participant "BluetoothAdapter" as BluetoothAdapter
participant "BluetoothDevice" as BluetoothDevice
participant "BluetoothGatt" as BluetoothGatt
participant "WifiList" as WifiList

note left: 笔记
note right: 返回

== 初始化 ==
activate IotRecorderManager
activate DevicesManagerMachine
activate BlueDiscoveryControl
activate BlueBondControl
activate BleScanControl
activate BluetoothGattConfig

IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: InitState
DevicesManagerMachine --> BlueDiscoveryControl: initState.enter
BlueDiscoveryControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: registerReceiver

== 搜索设备 ==
group 搜索设备
    activate IotRecorderManager
    IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: startDiscoveryDevice
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BlueDiscoveryControl: startDiscoveryDevice
    BlueDiscoveryControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: initState --> DiscoveryState
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BlueDiscoveryControl: CMD_DISCOVERY_START
    BlueDiscoveryControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: DiscoveryState.enter
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BlueDiscoveryControl: registerReceiver
    BlueDiscoveryControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: new DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BlueDiscoveryControl: startDiscovery
    BlueDiscoveryControl --> BluetoothAdapter: startDiscovery
    BluetoothAdapter --> BlueDiscoveryControl: DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
    BlueDiscoveryControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: BluetoothDevice.ACTION_FOUND
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BlueDiscoveryControl: MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND
    BlueDiscoveryControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: sendMessage
    DevicesManagerMachine --> IotRecorderManager: MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND\n返回新扫描到的设备信息：BluetoothDevice
end group

== 绑定设备 ==
group 绑定设备
    activate IotRecorderManager
    IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: BondDevice
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BlueBondControl: BondDevice
    BlueBondControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: CMD_BOND_DEVICE
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BlueDiscoveryControl: cancelDiscovery
    BlueDiscoveryControl --> BluetoothAdapter: cancelDiscovery
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BlueBondControl: bondDevice
    BlueBondControl --> BluetoothDevice: createBond
    BluetoothDevice --> BlueBondControl: BondBroadcastReceiver
    BlueBondControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: DiscoveryState --> BondedState
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BlueBondControl: MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
    BlueBondControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: BondedState.enter
    DevicesManagerMachine --> IotRecorderManager: MSG_BOND_SUCCESS\n返回绑定设备成功
end group

== 建立GATT连接 ==
group 建立GATT连接
    activate IotRecorderManager
    IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: connectGatt
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BleScanControl: connectGatt
    BleScanControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: BondedState --> BleScanState
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BleScanControl: CMD_CONNECT_GATT
    BleScanControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: BleScanState.enter
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BleScanControl: startLeScan
    BleScanControl --> BluetoothAdapter: getBluetoothLeScanner().startScan
    BluetoothAdapter --> BleScanControl: ScanCallback.onScanResult
    BleScanControl --> BluetoothAdapter: getBluetoothLeScanner().stopScan
    BluetoothAdapter --> BleScanControl: MSG_LESCAN_RESULT
    BleScanControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: connect
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BluetoothGattConfig: connectGatt
    BluetoothGattConfig --> DevicesManagerMachine: BluetoothGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BluetoothGatt: discoverServices\n发现远程设备提供的服务，以及它们包含的特定特征和描述符
    BluetoothGatt --> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_GATT_CONNECTED
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BluetoothGattConfig: onServicesDiscovered
    BluetoothGattConfig --> BluetoothGatt: setCharacteristicNotification\n拿到需要的服务和特征
    BluetoothGatt --> BluetoothGattConfig: MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
    BluetoothGattConfig --> DevicesManagerMachine: MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BleScanControl: GattConnectedState.enter
    BleScanControl --> DevicesManagerMachine: BleScanState --> GattConnectedState
    DevicesManagerMachine --> IotRecorderManager: MSG_GATT_CONNECTED
end group

== 同步WiFi状态 ==
group 同步WiFi状态
    activate IotRecorderManager
    IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: syncWifiState
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BluetoothGattConfig: syncWifiState
    BluetoothGattConfig --> DevicesManagerMachine: CMD_SYNC_WIFI_STATE
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BluetoothGattConfig: syncWifiState
    BluetoothGattConfig --> BluetoothGatt: setCharacteristic CMD_GET_WIFI_STATE
    BluetoothGatt --> BluetoothGattConfig: writeCharacteristic\n向服务端传递数据
    BluetoothGattConfig --> DevicesManagerMachine: onCharacteristicChanged _UUID_WIFI_STATE\nWifiConfigState.setWifiState("ON")
    DevicesManagerMachine --> IotRecorderManager: message.what = DevicesManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_STATE;\nmessage.arg1 = WifiManagerMachine.WIFI_STATE;\nmessage.obj = new String(characteristic.getValue());
    IotRecorderManager --> DevicesManagerMachine: processMessage
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BluetoothGattConfig: processMessage
    BluetoothGattConfig --> IotRecorderManager: message.what = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE;\nmessage.obj = msg.obj;\nmessage.arg1 = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE_ON;\nmcClientHandler.sendMessages(msg);
    IotRecorderManager --> BluetoothGattConfig: WifiConfigState.processMessage
end group

== 打开/关闭开关 ==
group 打开/关闭开关
    activate IotRecorderManager
    IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: setWifiState
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BluetoothGattConfig: setWifiState
    BluetoothGattConfig --> DevicesManagerMachine: CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BluetoothGattConfig: setWifiState
    BluetoothGattConfig --> BluetoothGatt: setCharacteristic CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
    BluetoothGatt --> BluetoothGattConfig: writeCharacteristic\n向服务端传递数据
end group

== wifiScan ==
group wifiScan
    activate IotRecorderManager
    IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine: wifiScan
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BluetoothGattConfig: wifiScan
    BluetoothGattConfig --> DevicesManagerMachine: CMD_SCAN_WIFI_LIST
    DevicesManagerMachine --> BluetoothGattConfig: setUuidRequestScan
    BluetoothGattConfig --> BluetoothGatt: setCharacteristic CMD_GET_SCAN_WIFILIST
    BluetoothGatt --> BluetoothGattConfig: writeCharacteristic\n向服务端传递数据
    BluetoothGattConfig --> DevicesManagerMachine: UUID_WIFI_ACCESSPOINT <- sendWifiList <- SCAN_RESULTS_AVAILABLE_ACTION
    DevicesManagerMachine --> WifiList: updateAccessPoints
end group

deactivate IotRecorderManager
deactivate DevicesManagerMachine
deactivate BlueDiscoveryControl
deactivate BlueBondControl
deactivate BleScanControl
deactivate BluetoothGattConfig
deactivate BluetoothAdapter
deactivate BluetoothDevice
deactivate BluetoothGatt
deactivate WifiList

note bottom: 笔记
@enduml
```
